forkNetworkTreeConfirmBody: This online tree is from another author (or you only have read-only access). We can create your own editable copy in My garden. Continue?

forkNetworkTreeEmptyName: Please enter a name for the copy.
forkNetworkTreeInvalidData: This tree has no copyable curriculum loaded.
forkNetworkTreePromptBody: What should we call this tree in My garden?
graphCreateParentError: Could not resolve the parent folder for the new item.
graphExamCreatedOk: Exam created. You can edit its content now.
graphFolderCreatedOk: Module created. Add lessons inside it next.
graphFolderToolsScopeHint: These actions apply to the folder shown above: new items are created inside it. The highlighted row below is a topic or lesson inside that folder.
graphFolderToolsScopeHintRoot: New items are added at the first level of the course (under this start). Open a folder if you want to create something inside it.
graphLessonCreatedOk: Lesson created. You can edit its content now.
graphMoveDisabledRoot: The course start cannot be moved.
graphMoveLocalUseTree: Reorganize topics with Move in the course tree; path-based moves are not used for local gardens.
graphPromptFolderNameFriendly: You are creating a module inside “{parent}”. What should it be called?
graphPromptLessonNameFriendly: You are creating a lesson inside “{parent}”. What should it be called?
moveNoTargets: No valid folder to move into.
movePickOnTreeBanner: Navigate to the destination folder, then tap Move here.
movePickOnTreeHint: Navigate to the destination folder, then tap Move here.
plantTreeDesc: Create a new local knowledge tree.
plantTreeOpenFailed: Could not open your new tree.
plantTreeOpenFailedReason: Could not open your new tree: {reason}
treeMetaCreatorMissingHint: Sign in with your online account (Profile → Online account & sync) so the tree card shows you as the creator.
treeMetaDescriptionPh: Short summary for learners (map and full intro modal)
treeMetaMinCharsHint: Minimum {n} characters (required to save when changing these fields).
treeMetaSupportStripeHint: Only Stripe Payment Links (https://buy.stripe.com/…) are accepted. The link always points to Stripe checkout.
treeNameRequired: Enter a name for your tree.
treeReadOnlyHint: This course is read-only. Open My garden (local tree) or your own course published online to edit.
treeSupportStripeInvalid: That URL is not a valid Stripe Payment Link. Use a https://buy.stripe.com/… URL.
treesCcLicenseShort: All shared trees are free to reuse (CC BY-SA 4.0).
